## Summary

- Describe what changed and why.

## Linked Requirement IDs (Required)

- FR IDs: 
- UC IDs: 
- NFR IDs: 

## Changed Artifacts (Required)

- [ ] `FR-*` artifacts updated as needed
- [ ] `UC-*` artifacts updated as needed
- [ ] `NFRs.md` or relevant NFR links updated as needed
- [ ] Registries updated if required (`FR-Registry/`, `UC-Registry/`)
- [ ] Diagrams/tests/docs updated where applicable

## Traceability (Required)

- [ ] Traceability links use IDs (not titles only)
- [ ] FRs reference linked UCs/tests/design artifacts
- [ ] UCs reference linked FRs and relevant NFRs
- [ ] Gaps or missing links are explicitly documented

## Acceptance Criteria and Quality (Required)

- [ ] Acceptance criteria are testable (Given/When/Then where applicable)
- [ ] Status values use canonical enum: `Draft | In Review | Approved | Deprecated`
- [ ] Priority values use canonical enum: `Must | Should | Could`

## Open Questions / Risks (Required)

- [ ] Open questions listed
- [ ] Assumptions listed
- [ ] Risks and mitigation noted
